overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment during golden hour. The character travels along sidewalks, crosses an intersection at MLK Blvd, and walks beneath elevated highways while passing towering futuristic buildings including one labeled 'ORBITAL' and another with '06'.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside industrial complex with satellite dishes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along sidewalk approaching an intersection

entered.detail: large concrete wall with graffiti on the left side of the street
tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway
modern industrial building with large satellite dishes on the roof
curved elevated highway ramp visible in the distance
tall modern street lamp with orange accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk next to an industrial building with large satellite dishes. Palm trees line the left side along a concrete retaining wall, while the character approaches a distant intersection with elevated highway ramps visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection at MLK Boulevard with bus stop

events.description: traffic light changes to green, pedestrians begin crossing the street
character turns right at the corner onto a new street

agents.ego_description: waiting at crosswalk then crossing MLK Blvd and turning right at the corner

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the corner to cross the street

entered.detail: green street sign reading 'MLK Blvd' mounted on a pole
vertical traffic signal showing green light
covered bus stop with purple advertisement posters on the back panel
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: At the MLK Blvd intersection, the character waits at a crosswalk near a bus stop shelter with purple advertisements. After the light changes, the character crosses the street among other pedestrians and turns right, revealing towering futuristic buildings in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with futuristic corporate towers and elevated highways

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the top of the ORBITAL tower against the golden sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the street while looking up at the massive towers and architecture

entered.detail: massive cylindrical tower with 'ORBITAL' written vertically in white letters
tall rectangular industrial building with large '06' illuminated on the facade
multi-level highway interchange with directional signs pointing to Heywood
overhead gantry sign with directional arrows and destination names
large curved digital advertisement screen displaying product images
cluster of large satellite dishes mounted on building rooftops

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide street dominated by massive futuristic architecture including a cylindrical ORBITAL tower and a rectangular building marked '06'. Elevated highway overpasses crisscross overhead, and the camera tilts up to take in the scale of the structures against the golden hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded pedestrian walkway beneath highway overpasses

events.description: entering deep shadow beneath the elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the shadow of the massive highway overpass

entered.detail: green metal safety railing along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath the massive concrete structure of the elevated highway, entering a shaded corridor. The lighting shifts to a mix of shadow and distant sunlight, with metal railings lining the left side and a concrete retaining wall on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic cityscape that transitions from an open industrial perimeter into the dense, towering shadows of a high-tech urban core. It begins along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and satellite dishes, moving steadily toward a distant intersection marked by elevated highway ramps. As the camera reaches the MLK Blvd intersection, it pauses briefly at a bus stop with purple advertisements before crossing the street among pedestrians and turning toward a skyline of massive architecture. The scene then expands to reveal the immense scale of the city, tilting upward to capture a cylindrical ORBITAL tower and a building marked 06 against a golden hour sky. Finally, the camera moves beneath the heavy concrete overpasses of the highway, shifting from the warm sunlight into a shaded corridor flanked by metal railings and retaining walls.
